name: MikroTik DHCP Backup
description: SSH to a MikroTik DHCP server, run RouterOS export, and save the text backup under backups/mikrotik_dhcp.
author: System

inputs.name: router_device_id
inputs.label: Router Device (optional)
inputs.description: Select the MikroTik DHCP server from this site.

inputs.name: router_ip
inputs.label: Router IP (optional)
inputs.description: Reachable IP of the MikroTik DHCP server. Used if no router device is selected.

inputs.name: ssh_port
inputs.label: SSH Port
inputs.description: SSH port for the MikroTik device.

inputs.name: timeout_s
inputs.label: Timeout (seconds)
inputs.description: Maximum time to wait for the export command.
